scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='../../lib/api-zod/src/index.ts';const lines=[...new Set(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8').split('\n').filter(l=>!l.includes('generated/types')))];fs.writeFileSync(p,lines.join('\n'));" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
